title: Numerical study for enhancement of laminar ﬂow mixing
abstract:
To meet demands arising as a result of present trends towards miniaturization, an innovative design for promoting
mixing enhancement in a miniature can combustor is investigated using an unstructured ﬁnite-volume technique. A
multi-holed baﬄe plate is employed to create a ring of oxidizer jets surrounding a single fuel jet in parallel with the axis
of the cylindrical chamber. The baﬄe plate is found to produce a dramatic improvement to the mixing performance
when compared with simpler co-axial j
